title: Verilated::traceEverOn(true) call before time 0
body:
Thanks for taking the time to report this.

Can you attach an example that shows the issue?  (Must be openly licensed, ideally in test_regress format.)
%Error: Vtop.cpp:130: Turning on wave traces requires Verilated::traceEverOn(true) call before time 0.

I included this in my verilog file:
  initial begin
    $dumpfile("dump.fst");
    $dumpvars;
  end

This verilog code and cocotb testbench work both fst and vcd with icarus.

What 'verilator' command line do we use to run your example?
coco tb make file:
# Makefile

# defaults
SIM ?= verilator
TOPLEVEL_LANG ?= verilog

# waves
EXTRA_ARGS += --trace --trace-fst --trace-structs

# add files
VERILOG_SOURCES = mem.sv

# toplevel module name
TOPLEVEL = mem

# base name of python testbench
MODULE = mem_tb

# cocotb includes
include $(shell cocotb-config --makefiles)/Makefile.sim

What 'verilator --version' are you using?  Did you try it with the git master version?
Verilator 5.027 devel rev v5.026-130-g1b15509a9

What OS and distribution are you using?
Fedora KDE 40

May we assist you in trying to fix this in Verilator yourself?
Yes
(Please avoid attaching screenshots that show text - you can convert images to text using e.g. https://ocr.space)
